calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Jane Creason, Esq. for Plaintiff: Francis Casado, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Amanda A. Heinicke aka Amanda Sullivan Heinecke.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Amanda A. Heinicke aka Amanda Sullivan Heinecke as follows:
Restitution and possession of the property located at 953 Key Ave., San Francisco.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Back-Rents and Damages $14,222.00
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs $380.00
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2006 Off Calendar
